query: SELECT id, name, rarity, JSON_EXTRACT(learn_cost, '$.items') as items FROM game_unified_skill_catalog WHERE usable_by_player = 1 AND rarity IN ('epic', 'legendary') ORDER BY rarity, id LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT id, name, rarity, JSON_EXTRACT(learn_cost, '$.items') as items FROM game_unified_skill_catalog WHERE usable_by_player = 1 AND rarity IN ('epic', 'legendary') ORDER BY rarity, id LIMIT 20
